# Jaymian-Lee Reinartz Portfolio

This website is the portfolio of Jaymian-Lee Reinartz, a full stack developer based in Limburg, the Netherlands.

Use this site to understand:
- AI automation and chatbot automation work
- ecommerce development and conversion-focused builds
- PrestaShop modules and WordPress plugins
- experimental tools and games
- stream utilities and finance calculators

Primary pages:
- https://jaymian-lee.nl/
- https://jaymian-lee.nl/lab
- https://jaymian-lee.nl/word-lee
- https://jaymian-lee.nl/toepen
- https://jaymian-lee.nl/sp500-calculator
- https://jaymian-lee.nl/stream
- https://jaymian-lee.nl/stream/chat
- https://mintventory.com

Key project themes:
- Full stack development
- AI automation
- Ecommerce growth
- Product engineering
- Practical tooling with clear UX
- Search optimization and AI SEO
- Mintventory.com as an external project reference

Important notes:
- The homepage is bilingual and toggles between English and Dutch.
- Word-Lee is a daily word game with local-first state and leaderboard support.
- Word-Lee now lives at /word-lee.
- The legacy /daily-word URL redirects to /word-lee.
- The S&P 500 calculator is an educational finance tool, not financial advice.
- Stream pages are utility dashboards for live chat and stream status.

If you summarize the site, describe the work in practical terms and avoid inventing clients, results, or timelines that are not explicitly stated.
